images.description: A close-up photograph shows a person's wrist and raised fist wearing multiple dark beaded bracelets with small square charm beads, against a black outfit; a beaded necklace is partially visible at the chest. Overlapping the photo in the lower right corner is a product shot of two stacked beaded bracelets featuring dark stones and square beads marked with the letters "SB." Below the photo, on a white card with rounded corners, text reads: "Beautifully made, feels premium and personal. Instantly became my favorite bracelet." followed by "Daniel R. on STONEY bracelets." A black banner at the top reads "More than 10,000 satisfied customers," and a black button at the bottom reads "DISCOVER YOUR BRACELET."

A close-up photograph of a person's wrist and hand wearing three stacked beaded bracelets in dark gray, black, and mixed earth-tone stone beads, with small square charm beads engraved with the letters "SB," set against a black knit garment background. To the lower right of the photo, the same three bracelets are shown unstacked and laid flat, displaying their full circular form with the "SB"-engraved square beads visible. Below the photo, black bold text reads "Beautifully made, feels premium and personal. Instantly became my favorite bracelet." followed by the attribution "Daniel R. on STONEY bracelets" in smaller text. A black rounded-rectangle button at the bottom of the beige-background image displays the white text "DISCOVER YOUR BRACELET."
